description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is clad in light wood paneling, complemented by large, black-framed windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The house features a spacious paved driveway and a green hedge outlining the property boundary, adding a touch of landscaping. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some rooms featuring floor-to-ceiling glass. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhang and is accessible from the driveway, with a visible black support column. The overall aesthetic is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with light wood paneling, large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a paved driveway bordered by green hedges.
description_view_0: Front and right side of the house with the main entryway, driveway, and a hedge border visible.
description_view_1: Left side of the house showing a long row of windows and the paved area extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large paved area, symmetrical window arrangement, and hedge border.
description_view_3: Right side and partial rear view, highlighting the overhang, support column, and side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, black support column, and direct access from the paved driveway, minimalistic and functional.
